title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Adds a personal customization layer f
content:
✔ Adds a personal customization layer for students.
✔ Ties into literary symbolism from mythology and folklore.
✔ Gives minor strategic advantages without breaking balance.

📜 6. Expanded Archetype Customization – Buffs, Debuffs, & Core Features

📜 Every archetype starts with a unique set of permanent characteristics.

✔ Archetype Starting Features:
1️⃣ Starting Buff & Debuff
• Example: Warriors gain +2 to combat rolls but -1 to persuasion.
• Example: Tricksters gain +1 to deception but suffer a loyalty penalty.

2️⃣ Assigned Die for Rolling
• Different archetypes roll different dice for skill checks.
• Example: Guardians roll a D12 for strength-based checks, while Tricksters roll a D8 but get rerolls.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 514 (chunk 514/555)
